description: Style Note This orange top, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous top. Style this with jeans and ballet shoes for that girly vibe. Product Details Orange sleeveless top with a round neck, plastic embellishments on the front, ruched and elasticated on the sides at the hem and tassels on the left shoulder at the back Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
